_comment: Shared cross-language test vectors for kinetic-signals (Rust) and SpikeStream.jl (Julia). Tracks issue #3 / LIM-31. Both implementations must consume the SAME inputs and produce outputs within the documented ranges (and matching within tolerance once SpikeStream.jl validation is run against this file).

hurst.notes: Hurst exponent is clamped to [0, 1]. is_persistent = h > 0.52, is_antipersistent = h < 0.48.

hawkes.notes: intensity >= mu; avg_excitation >= 0; event_count == input length.

surprise.notes: surprise == abs(z_score) >= 0; anomaly when surprise > threshold. Non-positive inputs yield a zeroed result.

entropy.notes: shannon in [0, ln(bins)]; relative in [0, 1]; bin_count <= bins.

volatility.notes: Rolling RMS volatility sqrt(mean(r^2)) over the window, clamped to [0, 1].
